title: Faction Patch
description: Extends an existing vanilla faction with new units, buildings, and doctrines.

target_faction.description: ID of faction to extend. Use 'player' or 'enemy' for vanilla factions.

add.description: Content to add to the target faction.

units.description: Unit definition IDs to add to the faction.

buildings.description: Building definition IDs to add to the faction.

doctrines.description: Doctrine definition IDs to add to the faction.

role_overrides.description: Override the role of specific unit IDs. Key=unit ID, Value=role string.
